name: flow
description: Ticket-to-PR pipeline for planning, implementing, verifying, and delivering work in Flow-managed repositories.

interface.shortDescription: Run tickets from plan to reviewed draft PR
interface.longDescription: Plan tracker tickets, implement and verify changes in a Flow-managed worktree, and prepare a draft pull request using the repository's configured tracker, forge, stage handlers, and memory.
defaultPrompt: Run a Flow ticket from plan to draft PR.
Resume the Flow pipeline for the ticket on this branch.
Show the status of the current Flow run.
